overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V style) showing a character walking through a suburban residential neighborhood at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses streets at intersections, and passes other pedestrians and vehicles under street lamp illumination.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a suburban sidewalk at night, passing a blue station wagon that pulls up and parks. Street lamps illuminate the path while houses and trees line the street. A pedestrian is visible walking in the opposite direction on the far side of the street.

stops at corner stop sign to wait for passing traffic

segments.scene_description: The character steps into a wide suburban intersection, navigating the crosswalk while a beige sedan passes by. After waiting at the stop sign for traffic to clear, the character crosses with a group of pedestrians. The open intersection reveals more of the night sky and distant city lights.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential sidewalk, the character passes a woman in a beige dress walking in the same direction. The environment features palm trees, mailboxes, and ranch-style homes with well-maintained lawns. The character crosses a driveway entrance while street lamps cast shadows through the trees.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the residential street, waiting briefly for a dark sedan with bright headlights to pass. A man in a fedora walks on the grassy verge to the right. The character continues along the sidewalk past utility boxes and trash cans, with palm trees and suburban homes lining the route toward the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet suburban neighborhood at night, transitioning from a narrow residential street into a wide intersection and back into a palm-lined residential stretch. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk past a parking blue station wagon, with street lamps casting a glow over the surrounding houses and trees. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the view expands to reveal the night sky and distant city lights while they navigate a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians and passing vehicles. The scene then shifts back to a residential path characterized by ranch-style homes and palm trees, passing a woman in a beige dress and crossing a driveway. Finally, the camera follows the character across another street, pausing for a dark sedan with bright headlights before continuing past utility boxes and trash cans toward a distant intersection.
